fault_hypothesis: The expiry check on line 83 uses a strict greater-than comparison (`>`), but it should use greater-than-or-equal-to (`>=`) to correctly expire keys when the current time exactly matches the expiry time.

constraints.intent: The result of the strict inequality check should match the result of the correct non-strict check.

spec.expr: not (item is not None and now == _effective_expiry(item[1]) and __cbfl_result is not None)

constraints.intent: If a key exists and the current time is exactly its expiry time, the result must be None.
Stored expiry timestamps must be non-negative.
The effective expiry time should directly correspond to the stored expiry time.
